text: Loved the new export-to-CSV feature — saved me hours this week.
Export timed out on the 500K-row report twice in a row today.
Tutorial videos would really help new team members ramp up.
Customer support was incredibly responsive — back within 20 minutes.
We were billed twice for the same seat and still waiting on a refund after 5 days.
The dashboard redesign is a huge improvement, especially the new filters.
App crashed during a live demo today. Embarrassing in front of the client.
Considering upgrading — not sure yet, would like a longer trial.
Bulk import works flawlessly now after the v8.2 patch. Thank you.
SSO has been broken for our tenant for three days. Multiple tickets, no fix.
5 stars. Best tool we've adopted this quarter, hands down.
Would like an Excel export option alongside the CSV one.
The new pricing tier is misleading — hidden compute fees we weren't told about.
Auth migration was painless thanks to the step-by-step docs.
How do I delete an archived workspace? The docs only cover archiving.
Pricing per seat is fair for the feature set you get.
API rate limits hit us out of nowhere mid-batch. No warning, no docs on the new ceiling.
Documentation could use more end-to-end examples, not just API reference.
Pivot tables are fast — sub-second on 1M rows. Genuinely impressive.
Two-factor SMS codes never arrive. We've had to fall back to authenticator-app only.
Trying to compare your plans vs competitor X — a comparison page would help.
Onboarding wizard was clear and friendly. Got our team set up in under an hour.
Support ticket has been open since Monday — no human response so far.
Slack integration just works. Set it up in 30 seconds and never thought about it again.
Any plans for a Salesforce integration in the roadmap?
Search returns stale results — indexing is way behind real-time edits.
Mobile app is finally usable on iPad. The v8 redesign is the right direction.
Feature request: scheduled exports we can wire into our morning standup.
The dark mode update — chef's kiss. Whoever shipped it, thank you.
Mobile push notifications stopped after the v8 update. We need them for on-call alerts.
